summary: Completed comprehensive testing of EcoRent UK production-level functionality including Account Management, State Persistence, Chat Management, Test Notification, Pricing Logic, and Backend verification with Compliance Score

design_issues.issue: Tenant Chat page has session persistence issues - users get logged out when navigating directly to /dashboard/chat URL

passed_tests: Landing page shows 'Get Started' button (not 'Start Free Trial')
User registration with email/password works correctly
User login with email/password works correctly
Dashboard shows Compliance Score widget with compliant/non-compliant counts (0 compliant, 1 needs work)
Dashboard has Test Notification button that works (shows expected error when email not configured)
Settings page loads with all required sections (Profile, Security, Preferences, Notifications, Danger Zone)
Settings page has working notification toggles that persist state changes
Settings page has Change Password functionality
Settings page has Delete Account functionality in Danger Zone
Properties section accessible with Add Property button
Backend API endpoints all working (22/22 tests passed)
Dashboard stats endpoint returns compliance_percentage correctly
All auth endpoints working (registration, login, logout, change-password, 2FA, user settings)
All chat management endpoints working (create, get, delete individual, clear all)
Test notification endpoint working (expected failure when email not configured)
